nasb.text: “Thus you shall say to Hezekiah king of Judah, ‘Do not let your God in whom you trust deceive you, saying, “Jerusalem will not be given into the hand of the king of Assyria.”

esv.text: “Thus shall you speak to Hezekiah king of Judah: ‘Do not let your God in whom you trust deceive you by promising that Jerusalem will not be given into the hand of the king of Assyria.

cnv.text: “你們要對猶大王希西家這樣說：不要給你所倚靠的　神欺騙你說：耶路撒冷必不交在亞述王的手裡。

ccb.text: “不要让你所倚靠的上帝愚弄你，说什么耶路撒冷必不会落在亚述王手中。

csbs.text: “你们要对犹大王希西加这样说：‘不要让你所依靠的神欺哄你，说：耶路撒冷必不落入亚述王的手中。
